author: APEX orchestrator (Claude Opus 4.7)
anchor_policy: Every claim cites an audit JSON, filesystem read, or verbatim PHASE_STATE/shot_list/lyrics quote. Inherits ANIM-05 trust assumption (operator-controlled QNAP NAS share).

wo_milestone.quote: ANIM-06 — Assembly; first clip cut to existing lyrics. This is the first visible deliverable.

agent_build.wo_aspirational_label_not_used: music_video_pipeline/assemble_video.py — does not exist on disk; ANIM-01 §0.1 closed this naming mismatch. ANIM-06 binds to the real on-disk names.
agent_build.safety_pattern: Reuses ANIM-05's handle-bound hash with pre+post resolve+commonpath; same QNAP NAS trust assumption applies.

safety_tests_verified.rerun_guard: WILL_OVERWRITE_REFUSED exit 5 on second catalog without --force
safety_tests_verified.concat_plan_order: production clips sorted by ANIM-05 manifest `index` (canonical playback order); shot_id reported only for cross-reference + inversion audit; 20 entries (production_count) for Grog

grog_deliverable_registration.duration_delta_note: MP4 is 0.065s shorter than the last lyric end — within expected encoder/stitch tolerance. No drift flagged.
grog_deliverable_registration.phase_state_anchor_quote: session_2026_04_01_mv.shots = '20/20 complete — 19 Wan2.2 i2v two-stage MoE + 1 skip (existing). Zero errors.'
grog_deliverable_registration.phase_state_phase_2_2_signoff_quote: phase2_2_signoff.consistency_score = 0.95; gate_met_at = 2026-04-07T10:32:00Z (Galinda's pipeline-validation work that proved the route Grog later took)
grog_deliverable_registration.F4_acknowledgement_from_anim_02_correcti: PHASE_STATE.json claims 34.8MB for this file; actual is 47.98MB. ANIM-06 records the actual size (47,983,724 bytes); the PHASE_STATE.json discrepancy remains a jesse_animate housekeeping item per ANIM-02-WO-corrections.md.

concat_plan_anchor.ordering_rule: ANIM-05 manifest `index` is canonical playback order (ls-sorted clip files); shot_id reported but informational; inversions logged in shot_id_monotonic_inversions (empty for Grog manifest = monotonic).

trust_assumption_inheritance.spec_section: SPEC-ANIM-05.md §Trust assumption (operator-owned QNAP NAS share at 192.168.50.246, no untrusted writers, agent runs interactively as operator on workstation on same LAN)

operator_gated_blockers: G10 Supabase QC schema migration — still operator-gated; assembly manifest serves as the QC ledger for now
